Contact

Authors of this blog are members of the Flowers AI & CogSci Lab or collaborators, and can be contacted through information provided at the end of each blog post.

For general enquiries, please contact Pierre-Yves Oudeyer.

If you have specific feedback on this blog, please share it through our feedback form.

Acknowledgements

The design of this blog is inspired by Anatole (Hugo theme by Alexander Bilz) and built with Jekyll.

© 2026 DevCur. Built with Jekyll.
